title: JourneyGraph — Class Demo Dashboard
description: WMATA transit knowledge graph — class presentation

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH ()-[r]->()
RETURN type(r) AS Relationship, count(r) AS Count
ORDER BY Count DESC
LIMIT 15

settings.query:
MATCH ()-[r]->()
RETURN type(r) AS Relationship, count(r) AS Count
ORDER BY Count DESC
LIMIT 15

widgets.title: Metro Center — Graph Overview (Station + Routes + Platforms)

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (stn:Station {name: 'Metro Center'})
OPTIONAL MATCH path_routes = (stn)<-[:SERVES]-(r:Route:Rail)
OPTIONAL MATCH path_platforms = (stn)-[:CONTAINS]->(plt:Platform)
RETURN stn, path_routes, path_platforms

settings.query:
MATCH (stn:Station {name: 'Metro Center'})
OPTIONAL MATCH path_routes = (stn)<-[:SERVES]-(r:Route:Rail)
OPTIONAL MATCH path_platforms = (stn)-[:CONTAINS]->(plt:Platform)
RETURN stn, path_routes, path_platforms

latestCypherQueries.query: CALL db.relationshipTypes() YIELD relationshipType RETURN count(relationshipType) AS Distinct_Rel_Types

settings.query: CALL db.relationshipTypes() YIELD relationshipType RETURN count(relationshipType) AS Distinct_Rel_Types

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (n)
WHERE NOT n:TripUpdate AND NOT n:StopTimeUpdate
WITH labels(n) AS lbls
WITH [l IN lbls WHERE l IN ['Station','Platform','BusStop','Route','Trip','ServicePattern','Date','Interruption','OutageEvent','ServiceAlert','FareZone','FareProduct','Pathway','Level','StationEntrance','FareGate','RoutePattern','EntitySelector','Agency']][0] AS lbl
WHERE lbl IS NOT NULL
RETURN lbl AS Label, count(*) AS Count
ORDER BY Count DESC

settings.query:
MATCH (n)
WHERE NOT n:TripUpdate AND NOT n:StopTimeUpdate
WITH labels(n) AS lbls
WITH [l IN lbls WHERE l IN ['Station','Platform','BusStop','Route','Trip','ServicePattern','Date','Interruption','OutageEvent','ServiceAlert','FareZone','FareProduct','Pathway','Level','StationEntrance','FareGate','RoutePattern','EntitySelector','Agency']][0] AS lbl
WHERE lbl IS NOT NULL
RETURN lbl AS Label, count(*) AS Count
ORDER BY Count DESC

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (d:Date)
WITH min(d.date) AS earliest
RETURN left(earliest,4) + '-' + substring(earliest,4,2) + '-' + right(earliest,2) AS Earliest_Date

settings.query:

WITH min(d.date) AS earliest
RETURN left(earliest,4) + '-' + substring(earliest,4,2) + '-' + right(earliest,2) AS Earliest_Date

widgets.title: Metro Center — Scheduled Trips (Red Line, sample)

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (stn:Station {name: 'Metro Center'})-[:CONTAINS]->(plt:Platform)
WHERE plt.id IN ['PF_A01_1', 'PF_A01_2']
MATCH path_sched = (t:Trip)-[:SCHEDULED_AT]->(plt)
MATCH path_patt  = (t)-[:FOLLOWS]->(rp:RoutePattern)<-[:HAS_PATTERN]-(r:Route {route_id: 'RED'})
RETURN stn, plt, t, rp, r, path_sched, path_patt LIMIT 10

settings.query:
MATCH (stn:Station {name: 'Metro Center'})-[:CONTAINS]->(plt:Platform)
WHERE plt.id IN ['PF_A01_1', 'PF_A01_2']
MATCH path_sched = (t:Trip)-[:SCHEDULED_AT]->(plt)
MATCH path_patt  = (t)-[:FOLLOWS]->(rp:RoutePattern)<-[:HAS_PATTERN]-(r:Route {route_id: 'RED'})
RETURN stn, plt, t, rp, r, path_sched, path_patt LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Active Dates per Service Pattern Type

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (sp:ServicePattern)-[:ACTIVE_ON]->(d:Date)
RETURN
  CASE
    WHEN sp:Weekday THEN 'Weekday'
    WHEN sp:Saturday THEN 'Saturday'
    WHEN sp:Sunday THEN 'Sunday'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END AS Pattern,
  count(DISTINCT d) AS Active_Dates
ORDER BY Active_Dates DESC

settings.query:
MATCH (sp:ServicePattern)-[:ACTIVE_ON]->(d:Date)
RETURN
  CASE
    WHEN sp:Weekday THEN 'Weekday'
    WHEN sp:Saturday THEN 'Saturday'
    WHEN sp:Sunday THEN 'Sunday'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END AS Pattern,
  count(DISTINCT d) AS Active_Dates
ORDER BY Active_Dates DESC

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (d:Date)
WITH max(d.date) AS latest
RETURN left(latest,4) + '-' + substring(latest,4,2) + '-' + right(latest,2) AS Latest_Date

settings.query:

RETURN left(latest,4) + '-' + substring(latest,4,2) + '-' + right(latest,2) AS Latest_Date

WITH sp LIMIT 1
MATCH path = (sp)-[:ACTIVE_ON]->(d:Date)
RETURN sp, path LIMIT 14

MATCH path = (sp)-[:ACTIVE_ON]->(d:Date)

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (t:Trip)-[:OPERATED_ON]->(sp:ServicePattern)
RETURN
  CASE
    WHEN sp:Weekday THEN 'Weekday'
    WHEN sp:Saturday THEN 'Saturday'
    WHEN sp:Sunday THEN 'Sunday'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END AS Pattern,
  count(t) AS Trips
ORDER BY Trips DESC

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (r:Route:Rail)-[:SERVES]->(s:Station)
WITH s, collect(DISTINCT r.route_short_name) AS Lines, count(DISTINCT r) AS Line_Count
WHERE Line_Count > 1
RETURN s.name AS Station, Line_Count, Lines
ORDER BY Line_Count DESC

settings.query:
MATCH (r:Route:Rail)-[:SERVES]->(s:Station)
WITH s, collect(DISTINCT r.route_short_name) AS Lines, count(DISTINCT r) AS Line_Count
WHERE Line_Count > 1
RETURN s.name AS Station, Line_Count, Lines
ORDER BY Line_Count DESC

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (r:Route:Rail)-[:HAS_PATTERN]->(rp:RoutePattern)-[:HAS_TRIP]->(t:Trip)
RETURN r.route_short_name AS Route, count(t) AS Trips
ORDER BY Trips DESC

settings.query:
MATCH (r:Route:Rail)-[:HAS_PATTERN]->(rp:RoutePattern)-[:HAS_TRIP]->(t:Trip)
RETURN r.route_short_name AS Route, count(t) AS Trips
ORDER BY Trips DESC

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (r:Route:Rail)-[:SERVES]->(s:Station)
WITH s, count(DISTINCT r) AS line_count
WHERE line_count > 1
MATCH path = (r2:Route:Rail)-[:SERVES]->(s)
RETURN path LIMIT 60

settings.query:
MATCH (r:Route:Rail)-[:SERVES]->(s:Station)
WITH s, count(DISTINCT r) AS line_count
WHERE line_count > 1
MATCH path = (r2:Route:Rail)-[:SERVES]->(s)
RETURN path LIMIT 60

ORDER BY Total_Trips DESC
LIMIT 15

widgets.title: Metro Center — Accessible Walking Path (Entrance → Platform)

latestCypherQueries.query:
CALL gds.graph.drop('walkPath', false)
YIELD graphName
WITH graphName
CALL gds.graph.project.cypher(
  'walkPath',
  'MATCH (n)
   WHERE (n:StationEntrance OR n:Platform OR n:FareGate OR n:Pathway)
   AND NOT n.id IN ["A01_C01_104197", "A01_C01_104188", "A01_C01_104183"]
   RETURN id(n) AS id',
  'MATCH (a)-[:LINKS]->(b)
   WHERE NOT a.id IN ["A01_C01_104197", "A01_C01_104188", "A01_C01_104183"]
   AND NOT b.id IN ["A01_C01_104197", "A01_C01_104188", "A01_C01_104183"]
   RETURN id(a) AS source, id(b) AS target'
)
YIELD graphName AS gn
MATCH (ent:StationEntrance {id: 'ENT_A01_C01_E'})
MATCH (plt:Platform {id: 'PF_A01_1'})
CALL gds.bfs.stream(gn, {sourceNode: ent, targetNodes: [plt]})
YIELD path
WITH ent, plt, nodes(path) AS ns1
CALL gds.bfs.stream('walkPath', {sourceNode: plt, targetNodes: [ent]})
YIELD path AS path2
WITH ent, plt, ns1, [n IN nodes(path2) WHERE n IN ns1] AS ns_intersect
UNWIND ns_intersect AS n
WITH ent, plt, n
WHERE NOT (n:StationEntrance AND n <> ent)
AND NOT (n:Platform AND n <> plt)
WITH ent, plt, collect(DISTINCT n) AS ns
MATCH (a)-[lnk:LINKS]->(b)
WHERE a IN ns AND b IN ns
WITH ent, ns, collect(lnk) AS links
MATCH (stn:Station {name: 'Metro Center'})-[c:CONTAINS]->(ent)
MATCH (pw:Pathway {id: 'A01_C01_104175'})
RETURN stn, c, ent, ns, links, pw

CALL gds.graph.project.cypher(
  'walkPath',
  'MATCH (n)
   WHERE (n:StationEntrance OR n:Platform OR n:FareGate OR n:Pathway)
   AND NOT n.id IN ["A01_C01_104197", "A01_C01_104188", "A01_C01_104183"]
   RETURN id(n) AS id',
  'MATCH (a)-[:LINKS]->(b)
   WHERE NOT a.id IN ["A01_C01_104197", "A01_C01_104188", "A01_C01_104183"]
   AND NOT b.id IN ["A01_C01_104197", "A01_C01_104188", "A01_C01_104183"]
   RETURN id(a) AS source, id(b) AS target'
)
YIELD graphName
MATCH (ent:StationEntrance {id: 'ENT_A01_C01_E'})
MATCH (plt:Platform {id: 'PF_A01_1'})
CALL gds.bfs.stream(graphName, {sourceNode: ent, targetNodes: [plt]})
YIELD path
WITH ent, plt, nodes(path) AS ns1
CALL gds.bfs.stream('walkPath', {sourceNode: plt, targetNodes: [ent]})
YIELD path AS path2
WITH ent, plt, ns1, [n IN nodes(path2) WHERE n IN ns1] AS ns_intersect
UNWIND ns_intersect AS n
WITH ent, plt, n
WHERE NOT (n:StationEntrance AND n <> ent)
AND NOT (n:Platform AND n <> plt)
WITH ent, plt, collect(DISTINCT n) AS ns
MATCH (a)-[lnk:LINKS]->(b)
WHERE a IN ns AND b IN ns
WITH ent, ns, collect(lnk) AS links
MATCH (stn:Station {name: 'Metro Center'})-[c:CONTAINS]->(ent)
MATCH (pw:Pathway {id: 'A01_C01_104175'})
RETURN stn, c, ent, ns, links, pw

settings.query:
CALL gds.graph.drop('walkPath', false)
YIELD graphName
WITH graphName
CALL gds.graph.project.cypher(
  'walkPath',
  'MATCH (n)
   WHERE (n:StationEntrance OR n:Platform OR n:FareGate OR n:Pathway)
   AND NOT n.id IN ["A01_C01_104197", "A01_C01_104188", "A01_C01_104183"]
   RETURN id(n) AS id',
  'MATCH (a)-[:LINKS]->(b)
   WHERE NOT a.id IN ["A01_C01_104197", "A01_C01_104188", "A01_C01_104183"]
   AND NOT b.id IN ["A01_C01_104197", "A01_C01_104188", "A01_C01_104183"]
   RETURN id(a) AS source, id(b) AS target'
)
YIELD graphName AS gn
MATCH (ent:StationEntrance {id: 'ENT_A01_C01_E'})
MATCH (plt:Platform {id: 'PF_A01_1'})
CALL gds.bfs.stream(gn, {sourceNode: ent, targetNodes: [plt]})
YIELD path
WITH ent, plt, nodes(path) AS ns1
CALL gds.bfs.stream('walkPath', {sourceNode: plt, targetNodes: [ent]})
YIELD path AS path2
WITH ent, plt, ns1, [n IN nodes(path2) WHERE n IN ns1] AS ns_intersect
UNWIND ns_intersect AS n
WITH ent, plt, n
WHERE NOT (n:StationEntrance AND n <> ent)
AND NOT (n:Platform AND n <> plt)
WITH ent, plt, collect(DISTINCT n) AS ns
MATCH (a)-[lnk:LINKS]->(b)
WHERE a IN ns AND b IN ns
WITH ent, ns, collect(lnk) AS links
MATCH (stn:Station {name: 'Metro Center'})-[c:CONTAINS]->(ent)
MATCH (pw:Pathway {id: 'A01_C01_104175'})
RETURN stn, c, ent, ns, links, pw

widgets.title: Metro Center — Lower Mezzanine Walkway Network

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (lv:Level {level_id: 'A01_C01_L2'})
MATCH path = (lv)<-[:ON_LEVEL]-(w:Pathway:Walkway)
RETURN path LIMIT 40

settings.query:
MATCH (lv:Level {level_id: 'A01_C01_L2'})
MATCH path = (lv)<-[:ON_LEVEL]-(w:Pathway:Walkway)
RETURN path LIMIT 40

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (p:Pathway)
RETURN
  CASE
    WHEN p:Elevator THEN 'Elevator'
    WHEN p:Escalator THEN 'Escalator'
    WHEN p:Walkway THEN 'Walkway'
    WHEN p:Stairs THEN 'Stairs'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END AS Type,
  count(p) AS Count
ORDER BY Count DESC

settings.query:
MATCH (p:Pathway)
RETURN
  CASE
    WHEN p:Elevator THEN 'Elevator'
    WHEN p:Escalator THEN 'Escalator'
    WHEN p:Walkway THEN 'Walkway'
    WHEN p:Stairs THEN 'Stairs'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END AS Type,
  count(p) AS Count
ORDER BY Count DESC

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (o:OutageEvent {status: 'active'})-[:AFFECTS]->(p:Pathway)<-[:CONTAINS]-(stn:Station)
RETURN stn.name AS Station,
  count(CASE WHEN p:Elevator THEN 1 END) AS Elevator_Outages,
  count(CASE WHEN p:Escalator THEN 1 END) AS Escalator_Outages
ORDER BY Elevator_Outages + Escalator_Outages DESC

settings.query:
MATCH (o:OutageEvent {status: 'active'})-[:AFFECTS]->(p:Pathway)<-[:CONTAINS]-(stn:Station)
RETURN stn.name AS Station,
  count(CASE WHEN p:Elevator THEN 1 END) AS Elevator_Outages,
  count(CASE WHEN p:Escalator THEN 1 END) AS Escalator_Outages
ORDER BY Elevator_Outages + Escalator_Outages DESC

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (stn:Station {name: 'Glenmont'})
MATCH path1 = (stn)-[:CONTAINS]->(child)
WHERE child:Platform OR child:StationEntrance OR child:FareGate OR child:Pathway
OPTIONAL MATCH path2 = (child)-[:LINKS]-(linked)
RETURN stn, path1, path2

settings.query:
MATCH (stn:Station {name: 'Glenmont'})
MATCH path1 = (stn)-[:CONTAINS]->(child)
WHERE child:Platform OR child:StationEntrance OR child:FareGate OR child:Pathway
OPTIONAL MATCH path2 = (child)-[:LINKS]-(linked)
RETURN stn, path1, path2

latestCypherQueries.query:
CALL gds.graph.drop('accessBFS', false)
YIELD graphName
WITH graphName
CALL gds.graph.project.cypher(
  'accessBFS',
  'MATCH (n) WHERE n:StationEntrance OR n:Platform OR n:FareGate OR n:Pathway RETURN id(n) AS id',
  'MATCH (a)-[:LINKS]->(b) RETURN id(a) AS source, id(b) AS target'
)
YIELD graphName AS gn
MATCH (stn:Station {name: 'Metro Center'})-[:CONTAINS]->(entrance:StationEntrance)
WITH gn, entrance LIMIT 1
CALL gds.bfs.stream(gn, {sourceNode: entrance})
YIELD path
UNWIND nodes(path) AS n
WITH DISTINCT n
WHERE n:Platform OR n:FareGate OR n:StationEntrance
RETURN labels(n)[0] AS Node_Type, n.name AS Name, n.id AS ID
ORDER BY Node_Type, Name

settings.query:
CALL gds.graph.drop('accessBFS', false)
YIELD graphName
WITH graphName
CALL gds.graph.project.cypher(
  'accessBFS',
  'MATCH (n) WHERE n:StationEntrance OR n:Platform OR n:FareGate OR n:Pathway RETURN id(n) AS id',
  'MATCH (a)-[:LINKS]->(b) RETURN id(a) AS source, id(b) AS target'
)
YIELD graphName AS gn
MATCH (stn:Station {name: 'Metro Center'})-[:CONTAINS]->(entrance:StationEntrance)
WITH gn, entrance LIMIT 1
CALL gds.bfs.stream(gn, {sourceNode: entrance})
YIELD path
UNWIND nodes(path) AS n
WITH DISTINCT n
WHERE n:Platform OR n:FareGate OR n:StationEntrance
RETURN labels(n)[0] AS Node_Type, n.name AS Name, n.id AS ID
ORDER BY Node_Type, Name

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (i:Interruption:Skip {interruption_id: 'int_skip_115_14'})
MATCH path_date  = (i)-[:ON_DATE]->(d:Date)
MATCH path_route = (i)-[:AFFECTS_ROUTE]->(r:Route)
MATCH path_tu    = (i)-[:SOURCED_FROM]->(tu:TripUpdate)
RETURN i, path_date, path_route, path_tu LIMIT 8

settings.query:
MATCH (i:Interruption:Skip {interruption_id: 'int_skip_115_14'})
MATCH path_date  = (i)-[:ON_DATE]->(d:Date)
MATCH path_route = (i)-[:AFFECTS_ROUTE]->(r:Route)
MATCH path_tu    = (i)-[:SOURCED_FROM]->(tu:TripUpdate)
RETURN i, path_date, path_route, path_tu LIMIT 8

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (i:Interruption:Skip)-[:ON_DATE]->(d:Date {date: '20260413'})
MATCH (i)-[:AFFECTS_ROUTE]->(r:Route {route_id: 'BLUE'})
WHERE i.interruption_id STARTS WITH 'int_skip_115_'
WITH i, d, r,
     split(split(i.description, 'Stop ')[1], ' skipped')[0] AS platform_id
MATCH path_plt = (stn:Station)-[:CONTAINS]->(plt:Platform {id: platform_id})
MATCH path_int = (i)-[:ON_DATE]->(d)
MATCH path_rt  = (i)-[:AFFECTS_ROUTE]->(r)
RETURN i, stn, plt, path_plt, path_int, path_rt

settings.query:
MATCH (i:Interruption:Skip)-[:ON_DATE]->(d:Date {date: '20260413'})
MATCH (i)-[:AFFECTS_ROUTE]->(r:Route {route_id: 'BLUE'})
WHERE i.interruption_id STARTS WITH 'int_skip_115_'
WITH i, d, r,
     split(split(i.description, 'Stop ')[1], ' skipped')[0] AS platform_id
MATCH path_plt = (stn:Station)-[:CONTAINS]->(plt:Platform {id: platform_id})
MATCH path_int = (i)-[:ON_DATE]->(d)
MATCH path_rt  = (i)-[:AFFECTS_ROUTE]->(r)
RETURN i, stn, plt, path_plt, path_int, path_rt

widgets.title: Blue Line — Alert + Skip Interruptions Graph

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH path_alert = (sa:ServiceAlert)-[:HAS_SELECTOR]->(es:EntitySelector)
                   -[:TARGETS_ROUTE]->(r:Route {route_id: 'BLUE'})
MATCH path_skip  = (i:Interruption:Skip)-[:AFFECTS_ROUTE]->(r)
MATCH path_date  = (i)-[:ON_DATE]->(d:Date {date: '20260413'})
RETURN sa, es, r, i, d, path_alert, path_skip, path_date LIMIT 12

settings.query:
MATCH path_alert = (sa:ServiceAlert)-[:HAS_SELECTOR]->(es:EntitySelector)
                   -[:TARGETS_ROUTE]->(r:Route {route_id: 'BLUE'})
MATCH path_skip  = (i:Interruption:Skip)-[:AFFECTS_ROUTE]->(r)
MATCH path_date  = (i)-[:ON_DATE]->(d:Date {date: '20260413'})
RETURN sa, es, r, i, d, path_alert, path_skip, path_date LIMIT 12

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (i:Interruption)
RETURN
  CASE
    WHEN i:Skip THEN 'Skip'
    WHEN i:Delay THEN 'Delay'
    WHEN i:Cancellation THEN 'Cancellation'
    WHEN i:Accessibility THEN 'Accessibility'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END AS Type,
  count(i) AS Count
ORDER BY Count DESC

settings.query:
MATCH (i:Interruption)
RETURN
  CASE
    WHEN i:Skip THEN 'Skip'
    WHEN i:Delay THEN 'Delay'
    WHEN i:Cancellation THEN 'Cancellation'
    WHEN i:Accessibility THEN 'Accessibility'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END AS Type,
  count(i) AS Count
ORDER BY Count DESC

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH (sa:ServiceAlert)-[:HAS_SELECTOR]->(es:EntitySelector)-[:TARGETS_ROUTE]->(r:Route:Rail)
RETURN sa.alert_id AS Alert_ID, sa.effect AS Effect, sa.severity AS Severity, r.route_short_name AS Route
ORDER BY r.route_short_name

settings.query:
MATCH (sa:ServiceAlert)-[:HAS_SELECTOR]->(es:EntitySelector)-[:TARGETS_ROUTE]->(r:Route:Rail)
RETURN sa.alert_id AS Alert_ID, sa.effect AS Effect, sa.severity AS Severity, r.route_short_name AS Route
ORDER BY r.route_short_name

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH path_out = (o:OutageEvent {status: 'active'})-[:AFFECTS]->(p:Pathway)
MATCH path_stn = (stn:Station)-[:CONTAINS]->(p)
RETURN o, p, stn, path_out, path_stn LIMIT 30

settings.query:
MATCH path_out = (o:OutageEvent {status: 'active'})-[:AFFECTS]->(p:Pathway)
MATCH path_stn = (stn:Station)-[:CONTAINS]->(p)
RETURN o, p, stn, path_out, path_stn LIMIT 30
